sentences.arabic: أَثَّرَ الْقُرْآنُ الْكَرِيمُ تَأْثِيرًا كَبِيرًا فِي اللُّغَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ وَأَدَبِهَا.
sentences.translation: Časni Kur'an je imao veliki uticaj na arapski jezik i njegovu književnost.
sentences.translationEn: The Holy Quran had a great influence on the Arabic language and its literature.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ الْكُتَّابُ مِنْهُ الْفَصَاحَةَ وَدِقَّةَ التَّعْبِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Pisci su iz njega naučili rječitost i preciznost izražavanja.
sentences.translationEn: Writers learned eloquence and precision of expression from it.

sentences.arabic: نَجِدُ فِي النُّصُوصِ الْأَدَبِيَّةِ كَلِمَاتٍ قُرْآنِيَّةً رَائِعَةً.
sentences.translation: U književnim tekstovima nalazimo predivne kur'anske riječi.
sentences.translationEn: We find wonderful Quranic words in literary texts.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْأُسْلُوبُ يَمْنَحُ النَّثْرَ قُوَّةً وَجَمَالًا خَاصًّا.
sentences.translation: Ovaj stil daje prozi posebnu snagu i ljepotu.
sentences.translationEn: This style gives prose a special strength and beauty.

sentences.arabic: يَدْرُسُ الطُّلَّابُ هَذَا التَّأْثِيرَ لِتَحْسِينِ كِتَابَتِهِمُ الْأَدَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Studenti proučavaju ovaj uticaj kako bi poboljšali svoje književno pisanje.
sentences.translationEn: Students study this influence to improve their literary writing.
